creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to paulbeard from comment #4)
> Please upgrade to a supported release.

If you can't upgrade use 11-eol tag (to be created soon, use 6a5a9cc088e5 for now) which points to the last ports/ revision expected to build/work on FreeBSD 11.4.

> Not sure I can install a fix if one is forthcoming after today.

Current version (before 11-eol) built fine on the package cluster e.g.,

http://www.ipv6proxy.net/go.php?u=http://beefy9.nyi.freebsd.org/data/114amd64-default/3aec707659f1/logs/librsvg2-rust-2.52.0.log
http://www.ipv6proxy.net/go.php?u=http://beefy10.nyi.freebsd.org/data/114i386-default/3aec707659f1/logs/librsvg2-rust-2.52.0.log
